response.original_title: A Million Ways to Return Home
response.overview: A Bengali migrant worker, Bimal, and his Chinese migrant friend, Han Ming, strike the lottery with their shared bet. The duo encounter deceit, betrayal and the challenge of avoiding a nationwide manhunt to claim what is rightfully theirs. Their journey home questions the complexities and value of money today — $3.3 million Singapore dollars only serves to make things even more complicated.
response.title: A Million Ways to Return Home
